overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt exploring a Gothic castle. The clip transitions from a warm, book-filled interior library with a fireplace, through a moonlit courtyard with stained glass windows and a central fountain, into dark stone corridors with guards.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle library with fireplace and bookshelves

events.description: character turns right and walks toward the fireplace area
approaching the exit doorway leading outside

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the library, passing wooden tables and bookshelves, heading toward the exit

entered.detail: red and white checkered tile flooring throughout the room
tall dark wood bookshelves filled with books
large arched brick fireplace with iron grate, emitting warm light
wooden desks with papers and candles
metal barred gate leading to exterior

segments.scene_description: Geralt explores a warm, book-lined library with a checkered marble floor and a large brick fireplace. He walks past wooden desks and bookshelves, heading toward an iron-barred exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic cathedral courtyard with central fountain and cloister walkways

events.description: exits the building into the open courtyard with Gothic architecture
walks around the central fountain, turning slightly toward the stairs
approaching the entrance to the dark interior corridor

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the courtyard, passing the fountain and other characters

notable_agents.action: figure standing on the stairs near the entrance
character sitting on a stone bench reading

entered.detail: grey stone tile flooring of the courtyard
tall Gothic building with pointed arches and colorful stained glass windows
octagonal stone fountain with multiple tiers
stone seating arranged around the courtyard
row of Gothic arches forming the cloister walkway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building, Geralt enters a moonlit Gothic courtyard with a central stone fountain and tall stained glass windows. He walks along the paved courtyard, passing stone benches and other characters, surrounded by pointed archways and autumn foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark castle corridor with stone pillars and guards

events.description: enters the dark building from the courtyard, lighting drops significantly
moves deeper into the corridor where torchlight becomes the primary light source

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking up stone steps and through dark corridors, passing stationary guards

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing at attention near the wall
hooded figure standing guard near a doorway

entered.detail: red and white checkered tile flooring continuing into the corridor
rough stone walls in dim lighting
wall-mounted torches providing flickering orange light
dark wooden door at the end of the corridor
thick stone columns supporting the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends stone steps into a dark, narrow corridor illuminated only by wall-mounted torches. The checkered marble floor continues here as he passes armored guards standing against the rough stone walls, approaching a heavy wooden door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a warm, scholarly interior into a moonlit courtyard and finally into a cold, guarded corridor. It begins inside a book-lined library with a checkered marble floor, moving past wooden desks and a large brick fireplace toward an iron-barred exit. As Geralt steps outside, the scene opens into a Gothic courtyard bathed in moonlight, where the camera glides past a central stone fountain, stained glass windows, and autumn foliage. The movement then shifts as he ascends stone steps, leaving the open air for a dark, narrow corridor illuminated by flickering wall torches. Finally, the camera follows him across the continuing marble floor past armored guards standing against rough stone walls toward a heavy wooden door.
